reviews.comment:
De las peores experiencias de YPF, hace 10 años por lo menos. Tardan en atender, empleados desganados. Te cobran hasta el aire de las ruedas. No veo la hora que la privaticen y pongan surtidores autoservicio.

(Translated by Google)
One of the worst YPF experiences, at least 10 years ago. Service is slow, the employees are unmotivated. They charge you for everything, even tire air. I can't wait until they privatize it and install self-service pumps.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURncm95b2lRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Quería resaltar la atención del playero Guillermo que ayer 19/2 tipo 23:30 tenía todas las islas llenas y despachando, cuando la YPF de enfrente con 2 playeros tenían las estación con el 99% de las islas cerradas con cono y se escondieron para no atendemos.

(Translated by Google)
I wanted to highlight the attention of the gas station attendant Guillermo who yesterday, February 19th, around 11:30 PM, had all the pumps full and serving customers, while the YPF across the street with 2 attendants had 99% of the pumps closed with cones and they hid so as not to serve us.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnM2VEdUlBEAE

reviewReply.comment: Walter Podrsta Muchas gracias por tu valoracion! Te esperamos de vuelta en nuestra estacion de servicio. ¡Saludos!

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
